reviews.reviewTitle: Cheap price but not really clean.
reviews.originalTitle: Cheap price but not really clean
reviews.originalComment:
I was told by the manager, that the other utama guest house is only for male, this one is for females, but when I there most of the guest are male, it was quite confused.
Location is deep in the alley, nothing much at walking distance.
Building is quite new, but was mold and dirt start to build up at shower room.  Some brown mark on sheet, blanket smells unpleasant.
Aircon is cold, and yard is usually clean. Manager let us drop off luggage before check in time
reviews.reviewComments: I was told by the manager that the other utama guest house is only for males, while this one is for females, but when I was there, most of the guests were male, which was quite confusing. The location is deep in the alley, and there isn't much within walking distance. The building is quite new, but mold and dirt are starting to build up in the shower room. There are some brown marks on the sheets, and the blanket has an unpleasant smell. The air conditioning is cold, and the yard is usually clean. The manager allowed us to drop off our luggage before check-in time.

reviews.reviewTitle: Bersih tpi ga sesuai foto kamarnya
reviews.reviewComments: uda sampe udh pesan yg double bed atau twin malahan dikasih yg single gajelas emg, kmr mandi bersih tp air agak lambat pas rame yg pakek, trs dikasurnya juga ada rambut pirang gatau dah rambut siapa antara ga dibersihin atau hantu kli
